comment: Frozen CLI/JSON/config surface (#332). json_schemas are the versioned --json envelope schemas; llm_profile_keys are the recognized [llm] / [env.<name>.llm] skein.toml keys (unknown keys are never errors); new_backends are the `skein new --backend` values. The command/flag inventory is pinned verbatim by cli_usage.txt + cli_completions.zsh.
